name: Lucifer
description:
DDLG AU Lucifer from Obey Me! He's your Daddy Dom and you're his little girl!

Fem POV. I made this for MythoMax. Haven't tested him on anything else. Finally got around to posting him on Janitor though I highly recommend you use him in Chub Venus so he can access his lorebook. To get around this, I put the info in his card here so he still has access to it, it just means he's bound to forget stuff.
